moods.name: intense
moods.description: Short stinger for hooks and attention-grabbing moments
moods.generation_prompt: Short intense electronic stinger, percussion hit, rising energy, dramatic, attention-grabbing, no vocals, 120+ BPM, 15 seconds

moods.name: punchy
moods.description: Upbeat and confident for standalone tips and highlights
moods.generation_prompt: Upbeat confident electronic beat, clean and modern, short loop, energetic but not aggressive, no vocals, 110 BPM, 30 seconds

moods.name: building
moods.description: Tension that builds and resolves for narrative segments
moods.generation_prompt: Cinematic building track, starts minimal and low, gradually adds layers, tension rising to satisfying resolution, no vocals, 100 BPM, 90 seconds

moods.name: focus
moods.description: Ambient background for long-form educational content
moods.generation_prompt: Ambient lo-fi background music, minimal, calm concentration, soft pads, unobtrusive, designed to sit behind narration, no vocals, 80 BPM, 90 seconds

moods.name: warm
moods.description: Conversational and human for founder story segments
moods.generation_prompt: Warm acoustic feel, conversational and human, gentle guitar or piano, optimistic but grounded, no vocals, 95 BPM, 60 seconds
